summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 2.62%. the main contract I2405 closed 798. Some traders adoptseparate quotations, were negative to sell; Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multifrequency procurement strategy.
